Title: Unisex Pale Green Pocket T-Shirt - Minimalist Crewneck Tee
Description:
Elevate your casual wardrobe with this versatile and comfortable pocket t-shirt. Designed for a relaxed yet modern fit, this tee features a subtle, stylish pocket detail that adds character without overwhelming the clean lines.

Crafted from a soft, breathable fabric, it ensures maximum comfort whether you are running errands, lounging at home, or heading out for a casual date.

Product Highlights

  • Effortless Style: The minimalist design and pocket placement provide a sophisticated touch to any casual outfit.
  • Supreme Comfort: Made from soft, breathable cotton blends that feel great against the skin all day long.
  • Unisex Fit: Designed to flatter all body types, offering a perfect balance of style and wearability for everyone.

Whether you pair it with denim jeans, chino shorts, or layer it under a jacket, this sage green tee is a reliable staple. It's the perfect breathable choice for transitional seasons and everyday wear.
